title: National Sports of Canada Act
description: National Sports of Canada Act (National Sports of Canada Act). Current to 2026-02-04.

provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content: 1 This Act may be cited as the National Sports of Canada Act .

provisions.title: Hockey and lacrosse to be national sports
provisions.content: 2 The game commonly known as ice hockey is hereby recognized and declared to be the national winter sport of Canada and the game commonly known as lacrosse is hereby recognized and declared to be the national summer sport of Canada.
